title: Big Globe - Call of Yucatán Compatibility
description: A compatibility datapack for Call of Yucatán, makes all structures generate correctly in Big Globe
body:
[**Alternative CurseForge Download**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/big-globe-call-of-yucatan-compatibility)

A compatibility mod/datapack for [Call of Yucatan](https://modrinth.com/mod/call-of-yucutan), makes all structures generate correctly in [Big Globe](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-globe)

If you can't locate a structure with /locate, I recommend using mod ([Explorer Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/explorers-compass))

![x](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5406e2a4da0c35d3092e733e7ca632e7c29a6d5b.png)

![d](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81b515788942c83a2e0602842f13d7adef2b8d17.png)
